scripts.build: npm run build:heartbeat && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:heartbeat: npm run build:heartbeat:esm && npm run build:heartbeat:iife
scripts.build:client: npm run build:client:iife && npm run build:client:cjs && npm run build:client:esm
scripts.build:client:iife: mkdir -p packages/AdobeClient/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeClient/src/AdobeClientSideKit.js > packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=client_iife rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.build:client:cjs: mkdir -p packages/AdobeClient/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeClient/src/AdobeClientSideKit.js > packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=client_cjs rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.build:client:esm: mkdir -p packages/AdobeClient/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeClient/src/AdobeClientSideKit.js > packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=client_esm rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeClient/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.build:server: npm run build:server:iife && npm run build:server:cjs && npm run build:server:esm
scripts.build:server:iife: mkdir -p packages/AdobeServer/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeServer/src/AdobeServerSideKit.js > packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=server_iife rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.build:server:cjs: mkdir -p packages/AdobeServer/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeServer/src/AdobeServerSideKit.js > packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=server_cjs rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.build:server:esm: mkdir -p packages/AdobeServer/dist && cat AdobeSDKs/VisitorAPI.js AdobeSDKs/AppMeasurement.js packages/AdobeServer/src/AdobeServerSideKit.js > packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js; BUILD=server_esm rollup --config rollup.config.js; rm packages/AdobeServer/dist/_bundle-input.js
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server && npm run test:heartbeat
